minutes_briefs.title: TransLink police privacy rules removed from BC's FOI Act
minutes_briefs.summary: The BC government has removed several TransLink police-related organizations from Schedule 2 of the Freedom of Information and Protection of Privacy Act. This means these police units and their boards are no longer listed as 'designated law enforcement units' under the Act. The change affects how their records are handled under BC's privacy and access-to-information rules.
minutes_briefs.source_body:
Regulation: B.C. Reg. 81/2026
Made under: Freedom Of Information And Protection Of Privacy Act
Published in: No. 9 – B.C. Regs. 77 to 82, May 19, 2026
Deposit date: May 12, 2026

B.C. Reg. 81/2026, deposited May 12, 2026, under theFREEDOM OF INFORMATION AND PROTECTION OF PRIVACY ACT[section 76.1]. Ministerial Order M205/2026, dated May 7, 2026. I, Diana Gibson, Minister of Citizens’ Services, order that Schedule 2 of theFreedom of Information and Protection of Privacy Act, R.S.B.C. 1996, c. 165, is amended as set out in the attached Appendix. — D. GIBSON,Minister of Citizens’ Services. 1	Schedule 2 of the Freedom of Information and Protection of Privacy Act, R.S.B.C. 1996, c. 165, is amended (a)	by repealing the following: South Coast British Columbia Transportation Authority Police Service Designated    Law Enforcement Unit South Coast British Columbia Transportation Authority Police Service Designated    Law Enforcement Unit Board South Coast British Columbia Transportation Authority Police Service Designated    Policing Unit South Coast British Columbia Transportation Authority Police Service Designated    Policing Unit Board TransLink Security Management Ltd. Chief Officer, South Coast British Columbia Transportation Authority Police Service    Desiganated Policing Unit, and South Coast British Columbia Transportation Authority Police Service South Coast British Columbia Transportation Authority Police Service Board TransLink Security Management Ltd. Chief Officer, South Coast British Columbia Transportation Authority Police Service.
